name_cn:
0 Leather Medium
DIOR book tote 24 Early Spring New
I have to say, Dior really knows how to play.
The tote you can carry is here! Simply amazing.
A viral hit derived from the most classic tote.
More and more people love big bags; it's truly unisex.
Whether handheld or crossbody, commuting, gym, or business trips are effortless.
Structured and doesn't collapse; I wish I could carry it every day.
Big bag lovers can buy this with your eyes closed!!
36×16×27cm
Model 8834
